question: Based on the chart of rainfall (mm) over the recent 14‑day period, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: Total rainfall over the first 7 days of the period was higher than over the last 7 days.
options.B: Total rainfall was greater in the last 7 days of the period than in the first 7 days.
options.C: The totals for the first and last 7 days of the period were exactly the same.
options.D: It is impossible to compare rainfall between the first and last 7 days of the period using this chart.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the first segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
